# issueExternalSyncDisable

Disables external sync on an issue.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IssuePayload`](../objects/issue_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `attachmentId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The ID of the sync attachment to disable. |
